title: Ultimine AI music remixes
description: AI remixes of legendary melodies and recordings from Minecraft are now part of the game!
body:
AI created remixes of legendary melodies from Minecraft, and we transferred them into the game. Enjoy the game's sound in a whole new way!

![remixes of all discs in a new tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00d24948077a92535a1d48bf04756d59ffd6e784_0.webp)
We created remixes of all C418 melodies and all records. You can find all new records with updated texture designs and sounds in a separate tab.

![Updated design, texture, and sound](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/416ae08ee28925d1d0ef271b10603e96299819ef.png)
